name: sharegpt-admin-console
description: Standalone admin console for ShareGPT server management.
author: Sjeary

scripts.build:ui: npm --prefix ui install && npm --prefix ui run build
scripts.dev: npm run build:ui && npm exec -- electron .
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:ui && npm exec -- electron-builder --win portable
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:ui && npm exec -- electron-builder --mac dmg
